name: Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not combine the egg yolks; they will be used separately.
2. Peel, core, and cut the apples into halves. Make lengthwise slits about 1/2-inch deep and sprinkle with lemon juice and sugar. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, cream the butter and sugars until smooth.
4. Add the egg yolks one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Gradually stir in the lemon juice and zest.
6. Sift together the baking powder and flour; add to the batter gradually.
7. Mix in the milk and rum until combined.
8. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
9. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the batter.
10. Grease a springform pan generously with butter or oil.
11. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and arrange apple halves on top.
12. Brush the apples with oil.
13. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 35 to 40 minutes, or until golden brown.
14. Remove from the pan and sprinkle with confectioners' sugar before serving.
